nodes.name: Webhook: Bridge TX
nodes.notes: Option A (preferred): Receives POST from Tracker/FastAPI when a bridge tx exceeds threshold. Expected payload: { tx_hash, amount_tao, source_chain, dest_chain, timestamp, explorer_url }

nodes.name: Cron: Every 15min
nodes.notes: Option B (fallback): Poll every 15 minutes. DISABLED by default. Enable if webhook not available.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before posting API. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: Fetch Recent Txs
nodes.notes: Only used with Cron trigger. Fetches recent bridge transactions from Tracker/FastAPI.

nodes.name: Amount >= Threshold?
nodes.notes: Only alert for transactions above BRIDGE_TX_THRESHOLD (default: 100 TAO)

nodes.name: Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Prevent duplicate alerts. Keeps last 500 tx hashes in n8n static data (persists across executions on Cloud).

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check
nodes.notes: Enforce max 6 bridge alert posts per day per cadence.md. Uses static data for persistence.

nodes.name: Rate Limit OK?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if under daily rate limit. Rate-limited items go to Discord notification only.

nodes.name: Rate Limit: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify when a bridge alert is skipped due to daily rate limit.

nodes.name: Format Alert Tweet
nodes.notes: Format bridge tx into tweet. Validates chain names against allowlist and explorer URL against known domains. Rejects items with unknown chains.

nodes.name: Input Valid?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if input validation passed. Rejected items go to Discord alert.

nodes.name: Rejected: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Alert operator when a bridge alert is rejected due to invalid input (unknown chain, invalid URL).

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: Safe default: DRY_RUN must be strictly 'false' to publish. Any other value (true, undefined, empty) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Prepare dry-run data for Discord notification. No filesystem writes for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN: Discord Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run output to Discord for review instead of writing to filesystem.

nodes.name: Post Tweet
nodes.notes: Post via configured API. Default: OpenTweet. Switch to X API or Outstand by updating POSTING_API env var and this node's URL/auth.

nodes.name: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify Vew of posted bridge alert.

nodes.name: Increment Post Counter
nodes.notes: Increment daily rate limit counter only after a successful post (2xx). Prevents invalid/dry-run payloads from consuming the limit.
